input: user-item interaction graph and item tag information
output: user and item embeddings for recommendation
backbone: self-supervised alignment framework (compatible with various base recommenders)
loss: self-supervised contrastive loss (pairing user and tag representations) + recommendation loss (e.g., BPR)
key_idea: pair user embeddings with item tag embeddings via a self-supervised proxy task, using intent-aware multi-subspace alignment to avoid collapse
datasets: seven real-world datasets (not specified in abstract)
